_comment: LBNL FDD fan-coil unit (FCU) point name -> CAMBER Role mapping. A third BAS naming convention: unlike the cooling-only SDAHU, the FCU has BOTH a cooling and a heating coil plus an OA damper, so the outdoor-air-fraction and simultaneous-heating/cooling detectors both apply. Adding this equipment family is a config file, not a code change. Dataset: LBNL Fault Detection and Diagnostics Datasets (CC-BY).
